metadata.description: Random CNN and ResNet visual encoder baselines for the C6 audit.

sign_reversal.description: negative C_real_z vs C_real_state per-pair Spearman pairs

v1_favorable.description: V1-favorable D3xR0 and D3xR3 cells from Track A metadata

ordinary.description: Complement of invisible_quadrant, sign_reversal, latent_favorable, and v1_favorable

pixel_preparation.note: Simulator replay and V1 validation were performed once before the random-seed encoding loop.

preprocessing.resize: bilinear only when raw pixels are not already 224x224

architectures.small_cnn: Conv-BN-ReLU blocks 3->32->64->128->192, adaptive average pooling, Linear(192, 192)
architectures.resnet18: torchvision.models.resnet18(weights=None) with fc replaced by Linear(in_features, 192)

encode_metadata.gradient_context: torch.inference_mode() disables gradients only; model.train()/eval() controls BN behavior
